<!-- Thanks for contributing to Drift! Keep PRs small and focused. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `ruff check` and `ruff format` pass
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] `pytest tests/` passes, with tests added/updated for the change
- [ ] `README.md` updated if behavior or APIs changed
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `## [Unreleased]`

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything non-obvious: trade-offs, follow-ups, areas you want extra eyes on. -->
